investigation_cases.name: CRM Token Criminal Enterprise
investigation_cases.description: Multi-token fraud scheme involving SOSANA, SHIFT AI, and CRM tokens. 5-tier wallet infrastructure.

wallets.notes: Contract deployer. Never holds funds >2 hours. Immediate dispersal to Tier 2.
Controls 60%+ of liquidity pools. Linked to SOSANA and SHIFT AI deployments.
Drains pools within 48h of liquidity adds. Uses flash loans for cover.
Generates 80%+ of daily volume. Self-trading loops detected.
Holds emergency liquidity removal permissions.
Artificial price pumps before Tier 3 distributions.
Bridges funds to ETH, BSC, ARB networks.
Distributes to 6 downstream wallets. 2 hops to exit.
Distributes to 7 downstream wallets. 3 hops to exit.
Distributes to 8 downstream wallets. 1 hops to exit.
Distributes to 9 downstream wallets. 2 hops to exit.
Distributes to 10 downstream wallets. 3 hops to exit.
Distributes to 11 downstream wallets. 1 hops to exit.
Distributes to 12 downstream wallets. 2 hops to exit.
Distributes to 5 downstream wallets. 3 hops to exit.
Distributes to 6 downstream wallets. 1 hops to exit.
Distributes to 7 downstream wallets. 2 hops to exit.
Distributes to 8 downstream wallets. 3 hops to exit.
Distributes to 9 downstream wallets. 1 hops to exit.
Part of 17-wallet parallel operation. All funded within 7 seconds. Wiped after 35 days.
Part of 17-wallet parallel operation. All funded within 7 seconds. Wiped after 40 days.

Part of 17-wallet parallel operation. All funded within 7 seconds. Wiped after 110 days.
Part of 17-wallet parallel operation. All funded within 7 seconds. Wiped after 115 days.
Primary exit to Gate.io. $320K+ deposited. KYC subpoena priority #1.
Secondary exit to Coinbase. $185K+ deposited. KYC subpoena priority #2.
OTC/P2P exchanges. Harder trace but patterns detected.
Uses Tornado Cash and similar mixers. $70K+ obfuscated.
HOLDS 104.6M CRM (10.46% supply). Active threat for further extraction.
Secondary reserve. Dormant since March 2024. May reactivate.

kyc_subpoenas.notes: Primary exit vector. $320K+ traced. Identity will expose Tier 1 controller.
Secondary exit. US-based exchange = faster response.
OTC desk usage. Requires international cooperation.
